name: The League of Villains
description:
You’re a member of the LoV, just another part of this weird found family <3

I can’t get enough of diff LoV bots my bad guys, there will be more.

Fun extras: Hawks is here because I said so, Magne is alive because it’s before the overhaul arc, and I added Mustard because he’s just a baby and I decided he didn’t get arrested, this takes place a little after the camp raid but before overhaul!
creator: M3dicTh3Magpi3
